summary: Define M2 map fixture source policy
acceptance_criteria: A concise M2 map-fixture source policy exists for the 30 District/10 Settlement prototype fixture and explicitly distinguishes synthetic fixture data from formal historical map content.

The policy states when HISTORICAL, INFERRED, COMPOSITE, and FICTIONAL labels are required and blocks real cultural symbols, polity claims, or named historical settlements from entering M2 fixtures without a separate research/content task.
The policy defines minimum provenance fields expected by later map/content tasks, including source category, confidence, coordinate/geometry derivation note, and known limitations.
The policy covers bad-map test fixtures as validation data only, not production content.
No package, app, content-source, roadmap, ADR, product-scope, or implementation file is changed.
required_tests: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M2-MAP-SOURCE-POLICY-001
notes: This task exists because the M2 acceptance matrix includes map source policy evidence.
Keep the output policy-sized; do not start formal map production or historical-content expansion.
